name: claude-skills
description: Personal Claude Code skill library by pytholic — specialized workflows for Python development, debugging, code review, LLM engineering, and more.

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Reviews code changes for quality, correctness, and adherence to project conventions before commits or PRs. Checks for SOLID violations, DRY/YAGNI issues, missing tests, type safety, security concerns, and style compliance.

skills.name: codebase-research
skills.description: Navigate, search, and map codebases efficiently to answer structural and locational questions. Produces ranked, synthesized answers about code organization, symbol usage, and architecture.

skills.name: explain-code
skills.description: Explains code with analogies, diagrams, and step-by-step walkthroughs. Matches depth to the question — short for quick questions, layered for deep dives.

skills.name: llm-dev
skills.description: Expert guidance for LLM development — architectures, training, inference, RAG systems, agentic workflows, evals, tool use, and production applications.

skills.name: playwright-cli
skills.description: Automate browser interactions, test web pages, and work with Playwright tests.

skills.name: python-dev
skills.description: Expert Python development workflow biased toward simplicity and surgical changes. Applies OOP patterns only when complexity justifies them. Uses Python 3.13+, ruff, pyright, pytest, pyproject.toml.

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.description: Language-agnostic four-phase debugging methodology with root cause analysis. Emphasizes NO FIXES WITHOUT ROOT CAUSE FIRST.

skills.name: task-handover
skills.description: Create a structured handover document so the next agent or engineer can resume work with zero prior context. Produces a single HANDOVER.md that survives session boundaries.

skills.name: write-tests
skills.description: Write focused pytest tests covering critical paths, edge cases, and error handling. Avoids redundant tests that bloat the codebase.

bundles.name: all
bundles.description: Install all skills in this library.
